title: The BEST AI for 4K images. Free & fast
summary: Pixel Diffusion (PiD) is a free and open-source AI image model by Nvidia designed for generating high-resolution 4K images. The video demonstrates its use within ComfyUI workflows and compares its performance against competitors like SeedVR2.
